title: A dining experience that brings quality and tradition together.
subtitle: From our signature dosas and thalis to great coffee and desserts — every detail is crafted to make your visit memorable.

items.title: 100% Pure Vegetarian
items.description: A completely vegetarian menu with vegan options — South Indian, North Indian, Chinese, chats, juices, and desserts.

items.title: Great Coffee & Tea
items.description: Known for our filter coffee, masala chai, and refreshing milkshakes — the perfect companions to any meal.

items.title: Fully Accessible
items.description: Wheelchair-accessible car park, entrance, seating, and restrooms — everyone is welcome at Kalpataru Grand.

items.title: Family & Group Friendly
items.description: Good for kids, groups, tourists, and university students. Private dining room available for gatherings.
